18-30.spending_sentiments: Cautious but willing to splurge on high-value social experiences. Aegean students love spending time in local third-wave cafes; coffee is considered a social entry ticket rather than just a drink.

31-45.spending_sentiments: Value-oriented. They look for quality-price ratios and organic/local certifications. Prefer paying premium if it guarantees ecological sustainability or health benefits.

18-30.spending_sentiments: Trend-driven spender. Highly prone to impulsive purchases fueled by Instagram and TikTok trends. Will skip meals to afford the latest sneakers or premium branded coffee that conveys status.

31-45.spending_sentiments: Status and convenience buyer. Premium brand loyalty is very strong. High willingness to pay for premium services (express shipping, VIP club memberships, imported single-origin specialty coffees).
